prompt_improvement_lines: Prompt: decide from current metrics/logs/health/signals only; use ok+[] while observations are healthy; switch to suspect/incident only on objective fault evidence.
Prompt: choose type/subtype/root IDs by matching required evidence; do not reuse a familiar category when the evidence map names another root cause.
Prompt: ok means no problem; if health is degraded, severe logs appear, or metrics cross thresholds, use suspect/incident.
Prompt: avoid actions outside allowed paths/tools and prefer bounded reversible fixes before restart.
